title: Isolating DNA from Wolbachia and Drosophila with the QIAwave DNA Blood and Tissue Kit
author: Helene Hartman

steps_raw.instruction: Transfer Centrifuge tubes, 1.5 mL, safe-lock, PCR clean Eppendorf Catalog #22363212 containing sample to a bead-mill homogenizer. Homogenize at 1500 rpm, Room temperature, for 00:02:00 .

While waiting for the lysis incubation, complete the following: Set up 1 set of spin columns. Set up 1 set of Centrifuge tubes, 1.5 mL, safe-lock, PCR clean Eppendorf Catalog #22363212 . Premix 200 µL Buffer AL and 200 µL 200 proof ethanol per sample. Make extra.
Transfer the columns to clean Centrifuge tubes, 1.5 mL, safe-lock, PCR clean Eppendorf Catalog #22363212 .
Create lysis mixture containing the following, per sample in a Centrifuge tubes, 1.5 mL, safe-lock, PCR clean Eppendorf Catalog #22363212 : 180 µL Buffer ATL 20 µL Proteinase K
Add 200 µL lysis mixture to each sample.
Vortex briefly to mix.

Incubate at 56 °C for a minimum of 02:00:00 in a dry-bath incubator. Overnight incubation is also acceptable. (Optional) If using a Thermomixer, set to shake at 300 rpm, °C, . Four samples in a Thermomixer set to 56 o C and 300 rpm.

Add 400 µL of Buffer AL/ethanol mixture to each sample. Immediately vortex for 00:00:10 to mix. It is important that the samples are immediately mixed after the Buffer AL/ethanol mixture is added. Failing to do so can impact DNA yield.
Transfer samples to spin columns in collection tubes. Spin column within a waste collection tube.
Centrifuge for 00:01:00 at 16000 rcf, Room temperature, to capture the DNA on the column membranes.
Empty collection tubes by pouring into a waste container.
Add 500 µL Buffer AW1 to each sample.
Centrifuge for 00:01:00 at 16000 rcf, Room temperature, to wash the membranes.
Empty collection tubes by pouring into a waste container.
Add 500 µL Buffer AW2 to each sample.
Centrifuge for 00:01:00 at 16000 rcf, Room temperature, to wash the membranes.
Transfer the columns to new collection tubes.
Centrifuge for 00:03:00 at 16000 rcf, Room temperature, to dry the membranes.
Add 40 µL buffer AE to the membrane of each column. Take care to apply Buffer AE directly to the membrane. Salts are likely to accumulate in the sample if the buffer is applied to the plastic.
Incubate at Room temperature for 00:01:00 .

Centrifuge for 00:01:00 at 16000 rcf, Room temperature, to elute DNA from the membrane. As the column prevents complete closure of the centrifuge tube lid, position the lid inward toward the center of the centrifuge. Secure the centrifuge rotor lid properly to prevent tube lid breakage during centrifugation.
Use immediately or store at: -80 °C for long-term storage -20 °C for use within a few weeks 4 °C for use within a few days
